welcome.metaDescription: KLASSCI supports universities, colleges, high schools and digital learning. Choose the product built for your institution.
welcome.title: Which institution do you run?
welcome.kicker: The all-in-one African education SaaS, born in Côte d'Ivoire.
welcome.subtitle: KLASSCI brings every school workflow into one clear platform. Choose your universe and see the version designed for your team.

universite.name: University & Grandes écoles
universite.desc: LMD, semesters, credits, accounting and administration for higher education.

college.name: College & High school
college.desc: Terms, DREN-ready reports, cashier workflows, attendance and accounts for every school actor.

lms.name: Virtual classroom
lms.desc: Online courses, assignments, assessments and learning follow-up connected to your institution.

selector.title: Choose your operating universe
selector.intro: Two business experiences, one ambition: give African institutions a platform that feels trusted from the first screen.
selector.virtualTitle: Virtual classroom to extend your universe
selector.virtualText: Courses, assignments, assessments and learning follow-up can support your institution, whether you run a university or a school.

welcome.footNote: One account, one school. Hosted, backed up and secured.
